title: ilex verticillata subsp. tenuifolia
intro: Ilex verticillata subsp. tenuifolia, also known as the winterberry holly, is a plant species belonging to the Ilex genus, characterized by its deciduous habit and red berries that persist through the winter months. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which contain compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids that have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ilex verticillata subsp. tenuifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to aid in digestion, boost immune function, and provide relief from cold and flu symptoms.
